tools.name: sys_info
tools.description: Get current system information: date, time, timezone, OS, architecture, hostname, working directory, user, Go version, and uptime. Call this at the start of every conversation to orient yourself.

tools.name: fs_list
tools.description: List directory contents. Returns name, size, type, and modification time for each entry.

path.description: Directory path to list (relative or absolute). Defaults to current directory.

tools.name: fs_read
tools.description: Read a text file's content. File must be within an allowed path and under the read size limit.

path.description: Path to the file to read (relative or absolute).

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-based). Defaults to 1.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read. Defaults to 500.

tools.name: fs_write
tools.description: Create or overwrite a file with text content. File must be within an allowed path.

path.description: Path to the file to write (relative or absolute). Parent directory must exist.

content.description: The text content to write to the file.

tools.name: fs_delete
tools.description: Delete a single file. The file must be within an allowed path. Cannot delete directories.

path.description: Path to the file to delete (relative or absolute).

tools.name: fs_find
tools.description: Find files by name pattern (glob). Returns matching file paths.

path.description: Base directory to search in. Defaults to current directory.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to configured limit (200).

tools.name: fs_tree
tools.description: Display a directory tree structure as indented text. Depth-limited for safety.

path.description: Root directory for the tree. Defaults to current directory.

depth.description: Maximum depth to traverse. Defaults to configured limit (3).

exclude.description: Comma-separated list of directory names to exclude (e.g. 'node_modules,.git,vendor')

tools.name: fs_run
tools.description: Execute a command and capture its output. Runs via cmd /C on Windows. Commands may be restricted by the allowed_commands config.

command.description: The command to execute (e.g. 'dir', 'git status', 'python script.py')

timeout.description: Optional timeout in seconds (default from config)

tools.name: memory_save
tools.description: Create or update a memory in a bucket. Use this to remember something for future conversations.

bucket.description: The bucket (category) to store the memory in (e.g. 'user', 'work', 'general')

key.description: Unique key for the memory within the bucket (e.g. 'theme_preference')

keywords.description: Optional comma-separated keywords for better search recall (e.g. 'user, theme, dark')

tools.name: memory_edit
tools.description: Update an existing memory's value in a bucket. Fails if the memory doesn't exist.

key.description: The key of the memory to update

value.description: The new value for the memory

tools.name: memory_delete
tools.description: Delete a specific memory from a bucket.

key.description: The key of the memory to delete

tools.name: memory_load
tools.description: Load a single memory's value from a bucket.

key.description: The key of the memory to load

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List memories. Provide a bucket to list only that bucket; omit to list all memories across all buckets.

bucket.description: Optional bucket name. If omitted, lists all memories across all buckets.

tools.name: memory_delete_bucket
tools.description: Delete a bucket and all memories in it.

bucket.description: The name of the bucket to delete

tools.name: memory_list_buckets
tools.description: List all memory buckets with their memory counts.

tools.name: exa_search
tools.description: Search the web using Exa AI (neural search with highlights and synthesized answers). Requires EXA_API_KEY env var.

type.description: Search type: auto (default), fast, instant, deep, deep-lite, deep-reasoning

include_domains.description: Comma-separated list of domains to restrict search to (e.g. 'github.com,stackoverflow.com')

exclude_domains.description: Comma-separated list of domains to exclude from results

system_prompt.description: System prompt to guide synthesis behavior (used with output_schema)

output_schema.description: JSON Schema string for structured output (triggers synthesis)

tools.name: google_search
tools.description: Search the web using Google Custom Search

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch and read the content of a web page

url.description: The URL of the web page to fetch

outputSchema.description: Extracted text content from the web page (HTML, plain text, or PDF)

tools.name: wikidata_query
tools.description: Query Wikidata for structured knowledge about entities, people, places, concepts, and more. Supports three modes: 'entity' (fetch by Q-ID like Q42), 'search' (text search for entities), and 'sparql' (run a SPARQL query for complex data retrieval).

mode.description: Query mode: 'entity' (fetch by Q-ID), 'search' (text search), or 'sparql' (SPARQL query)

query.description: The query: Q-ID like 'Q42' (entity mode), search text like 'Ada Lovelace' (search mode), or a SPARQL query (sparql mode)

limit.description: Max results for search mode (default 10, max 50)

oneOf.description: Entity mode: array of entity objects with curated properties
Search mode: array of search result objects
